title: White Velvet Ribbon Double Faced 10mm x 27m(30 Yards) White Vintage Velvet Christmas Ribbon for Christmas Tree Crafts Wreath Gift Wrapping Bow Making and Wedding Decoration
features: SIZE DETAILS - Christmas velvet ribbon measures approx. 10mm(3/8 inch) in width and 2.5mm(0.1 inch) in thickness. Each roll measures approx. 30 yards/ 27 m in length

DOUBLE-SIDED VELVET RIBBON - Made of high-quality Dutch velvet, double-faced velvet ribbon is thick, soft and luxurious. It features smooth velvet on both sides, adding an elegant touch to any project

MORE COLOR CHOICE - Our velvet ribbon rolls come in more than one color like white, black, green, brown, red, wine and so on. We have many other colors to choose from, which can meet your various creative needs

VARIOUS USAGE - Thick velvet ribbon is great for gift wrapping, Christmas tree decor, wreaths decor, wedding invitations, velvet choker necklaces, fashion accessories, headbands, hair bows, DIY craft projects, party decor, home decoration and so on

FRIENDLY REMINDER - The ribbon images are professionally crafted by our design department. Due to differences in cameras, phones, and computer screen lighting, there might be slight color variations. We are committed to providing customers with high-quality ribbons, and if you have any questions, please feel free to contact us
